lines.gurmukhi: ਏਹੁ ਜੋਗੁ ਨ ਹੋਵੈ ਜੋਗੀ ਜਿ ਕੁਟੰਬੁ ਛੋਡਿ ਪਰਭਵਣੁ ਕਰਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: ehu jog na hovai jogee ji kuttanb chhodd parabhavan kareh |
lines.english: This is not Yoga, O Yogi, to abandon your family and wander around.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗ੍ਰਿਹ ਸਰੀਰ ਮਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਅਪਣਾ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਲਹਹਿ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: grih sareer meh har har naam gur parasaadee apanaa har prabh laheh |8|
lines.english: The Name of the Lord, Har, Har, is within the household of the body. By Guru's Grace, you shall find your Lord God. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਜਗਤੁ ਮਿਟੀ ਕਾ ਪੁਤਲਾ ਜੋਗੀ ਇਸੁ ਮਹਿ ਰੋਗੁ ਵਡਾ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: eihu jagat mittee kaa putalaa jogee is meh rog vaddaa trisanaa maaeaa |
lines.english: This world is a puppet of clay, Yogi; the terrible disease, the desire for Maya is in it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨੇਕ ਜਤਨ ਭੇਖ ਕਰੇ ਜੋਗੀ ਰੋਗੁ ਨ ਜਾਇ ਗਵਾਇਆ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: anek jatan bhekh kare jogee rog na jaae gavaaeaa |9|
lines.english: Making all sorts of efforts, and wearing religious robes, Yogi, this disease cannot be cured. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਉਖਧੁ ਹੈ ਜੋਗੀ ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: har kaa naam aaukhadh hai jogee jis no man vasaae |
lines.english: The Name of the Lord is the medicine, Yogi; the Lord enshrines it in the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਸੋਈ ਬੂਝੈ ਜੋਗ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਸੋ ਪਾਏ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: guramukh hovai soee boojhai jog jugat so paae |10|
lines.english: One who becomes Gurmukh understands this; he alone finds the Way of Yoga. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਗੈ ਕਾ ਮਾਰਗੁ ਬਿਖਮੁ ਹੈ ਜੋਗੀ ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਸੋ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jogai kaa maarag bikham hai jogee jis no nadar kare so paae |
lines.english: The Path of Yoga is very difficult, Yogi; he alone finds it, whom God blesses with His Grace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਏਕੋ ਵੇਖੈ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਭਰਮੁ ਚੁਕਾਏ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: antar baahar eko vekhai vichahu bharam chukaae |11|
lines.english: Inside and outside, he sees the One Lord; he eliminates doubt from within himself. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਣੁ ਵਜਾਈ ਕਿੰਗੁਰੀ ਵਾਜੈ ਜੋਗੀ ਸਾ ਕਿੰਗੁਰੀ ਵਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: vin vajaaee kinguree vaajai jogee saa kinguree vajaae |
lines.english: So play the harp which vibrates without being played, Yogi.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੈ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਹੋਵਹਿ ਜੋਗੀ ਸਾਚੇ ਰਹਹਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੧੨॥੧॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: kahai naanak mukat hoveh jogee saache raheh samaae |12|1|10|
lines.english: Says Nanak, thus you shall be liberated, Yogi, and remain merged in the True Lord. ||12||1||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮਕਲੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: raamakalee mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Raamkalee, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਿ ਖਜਾਨਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜਾਤਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਬੂਝਿ ਬੁਝਾਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bhagat khajaanaa guramukh jaataa satigur boojh bujhaaee |1|
lines.english: The treasure of devotional worship is revealed to the Gurmukh; the True Guru has inspired me to understand this understanding. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤਹੁ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਦੇਇ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: santahu guramukh dee vaddiaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: O Saints, the Gurmukh is blessed with glorious greatness. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਿ ਰਹਹੁ ਸਦਾ ਸਹਜੁ ਸੁਖੁ ਉਪਜੈ ਕਾਮੁ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਜਾਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sach rahahu sadaa sehaj sukh upajai kaam krodh vichahu jaaee |2|
lines.english: Dwelling always in Truth, celestial peace wells up; sexual desire and anger are eliminated from within. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੁ ਛੋਡਿ ਨਾਮ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਗੀ ਮਮਤਾ ਸਬਦਿ ਜਲਾਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aap chhodd naam liv laagee mamataa sabad jalaaee |3|
lines.english: Eradicating self-conceit, remain lovingly focused on the Naam, the Name of the Lord; through the Word of the Shabad, burn away possessiveness. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਤੇ ਉਪਜੈ ਤਿਸ ਤੇ ਬਿਨਸੈ ਅੰਤੇ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਖਾਈ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: jis te upajai tis te binasai ante naam sakhaaee |4|
lines.english: By Him we are created, and by Him we are destroyed; in the end, the Naam will be our only help and support. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਹਜੂਰਿ ਦੂਰਿ ਨਹ ਦੇਖਹੁ ਰਚਨਾ ਜਿਨਿ ਰਚਾਈ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: sadaa hajoor door neh dekhahu rachanaa jin rachaaee |5|
lines.english: He is ever-present; don't think that He is far away. He created the creation. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਰਵੈ ਘਟ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸਚੇ ਸਿਉ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਈ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: sachaa sabad ravai ghatt antar sache siau liv laaee |6|
lines.english: Deep within your heart, chant the True Word of the Shabad; remain lovingly absorbed in the True Lord. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਮਹਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਰਮੋਲਕੁ ਵਡੈ ਭਾਗਿ ਪਾਇਆ ਜਾਈ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: satasangat meh naam niramolak vaddai bhaag paaeaa jaaee |7|
lines.english: The Priceless Naam is in the Society of the Saints; by great good fortune, it is obtained. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਸਭ ਭੂਲੀ ਫਿਰਦੀ ਬਿਰਥਾ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਵਾਈ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: bin naavai sabh bhoolee firadee birathaa janam gavaaee |9|
lines.english: Without the Name, everyone wanders around in confusion; they waste away their lives in vain. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਰਮਿ ਨ ਭੂਲਹੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਰਾਖਹੁ ਇਕ ਠਾਈ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: bharam na bhoolahu satigur sevahu man raakhahu ik tthaaee |8|
lines.english: Do not be deluded by doubt; serve the True Guru, and keep your mind steady in one place. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਵ ਨਗਰੀ ਮਹਿ ਆਸਣਿ ਬੈਸੈ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਜੋਗੁ ਪਾਈ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: siv nagaree meh aasan baisai gurasabadee jog paaee |11|
lines.english: Sitting in Yogic postures in the City of God, through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, you shall find Yoga. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਗੀ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਗਵਾਈ ਹੰਢੈ ਪਾਖੰਡਿ ਜੋਗੁ ਨ ਪਾਈ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: jogee jugat gavaaee handtai paakhandd jog na paaee |10|
lines.english: Yogi, you have lost the Way; you wander around confused. Through hypocrisy, Yoga is not attained. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਾਤੁਰ ਬਾਜੀ ਸਬਦਿ ਨਿਵਾਰੇ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਆਈ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: dhaatur baajee sabad nivaare naam vasai man aaee |12|
lines.english: Restrain your restless wanderings through the Shabad, and the Naam will come to dwell in your mind. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਹੁ ਸਰੀਰੁ ਸਰਵਰੁ ਹੈ ਸੰਤਹੁ ਇਸਨਾਨੁ ਕਰੇ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਈ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: ehu sareer saravar hai santahu isanaan kare liv laaee |13|
lines.english: This body is a pool, O Saints; bathe in it, and enshrine love for the Lord. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮਿ ਇਸਨਾਨੁ ਕਰਹਿ ਸੇ ਜਨ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਸਬਦੇ ਮੈਲੁ ਗਵਾਈ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: naam isanaan kareh se jan niramal sabade mail gavaaee |14|
lines.english: Those who cleanse themselves through the Naam, are the most immaculate people; through the Shabad, they wash off their filth. ||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰੈ ਗੁਣ ਅਚੇਤ ਨਾਮੁ ਚੇਤਹਿ ਨਾਹੀ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਬਿਨਸਿ ਜਾਈ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: trai gun achet naam cheteh naahee bin naavai binas jaaee |15|
lines.english: Trapped by the three qualities, the unconscious person does not think of the Naam; without the Name, he wastes away. ||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮਾ ਬਿਸਨੁ ਮਹੇਸੁ ਤ੍ਰੈ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਤ੍ਰਿਗੁਣਿ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਈ ॥੧੬॥
lines.translit: brahamaa bisan mahes trai moorat trigun bharam bhulaaee |16|
lines.english: The three forms of Brahma, Vishnu and Shiva are trapped in the three qualities, lost in confusion. ||16||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਤ੍ਰਿਕੁਟੀ ਛੂਟੈ ਚਉਥੈ ਪਦਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਈ ॥੧੭॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee trikuttee chhoottai chauthai pad liv laaee |17|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, this triad is eradicated, and one is lovingly absorbed in the fourth state. ||17||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਖਿਆ ਮਾਤੇ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਏ ਉਪਦੇਸੁ ਕਹਹਿ ਕਿਸੁ ਭਾਈ ॥੧੯॥
lines.translit: bikhiaa maate bharam bhulaae upades kaheh kis bhaaee |19|
lines.english: Engrossed in corruption, they wander in confusion; who can they possibly instruct, O Siblings of Destiny? ||19||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਡਿਤ ਪੜਹਿ ਪੜਿ ਵਾਦੁ ਵਖਾਣਹਿ ਤਿੰਨਾ ਬੂਝ ਨ ਪਾਈ ॥੧੮॥
lines.translit: panddit parreh parr vaad vakhaaneh tinaa boojh na paaee |18|
lines.english: The Pandits, the religious scholars, read, study and discuss the arguments; they do not understand. ||18||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤ ਜਨਾ ਕੀ ਊਤਮ ਬਾਣੀ ਜੁਗਿ ਜੁਗਿ ਰਹੀ ਸਮਾਈ ॥੨੦॥
lines.translit: bhagat janaa kee aootam baanee jug jug rahee samaaee |20|
lines.english: The Bani, the Word of the humble devotee is the most sublime and exalted; it prevails throughout the ages. ||20||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਣੀ ਲਾਗੈ ਸੋ ਗਤਿ ਪਾਏ ਸਬਦੇ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਈ ॥੨੧॥
lines.translit: baanee laagai so gat paae sabade sach samaaee |21|
lines.english: One who is committed to this Bani is emancipated, and through the Shabad, merges in Truth. ||21||
